mapper.select: SELECT * FROM episode_video WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} ORDER BY quality
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO episode_video ( source_id, quality, video_url, video_format, decoded_at, decode_method, decode_failed_count, decode_last_error, ttl_seconds ) VALUES ( #{video.sourceId}, #{video.quality}, #{video.videoUrl}, #{video.videoFormat}, #{video.decodedAt}, #{video.decodeMethod}, COALESCE(#{video.decodeFailedCount}, 0), #{video.decodeLastError}, #{video.ttlSeconds} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE video_url = COALESCE(VALUES(video_url), video_url), video_format = COALESCE(VALUES(video_format), video_format), decoded_at = COALESCE(VALUES(decoded_at), decoded_at), decode_method = COALESCE(VALUES(decode_method), decode_method), decode_failed_count = 0, decode_last_error = NULL, ttl_seconds = COALESCE(VALUES(ttl_seconds), ttl_seconds)
mapper.update: INSERT INTO episode_video (source_id, quality, decoded_at, decode_failed_count, decode_last_error) VALUES (#{sourceId}, #{quality}, #{now}, 1, #{error}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE decode_failed_count = decode_failed_count + 1, decode_last_error = #{error}
